titleStmt.title: SII 41.206: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 206. (A.R. No. 424 of 1905.) Guḍimallūr, Walaja Taluk, North Arcot District. On the south and east walls of the central shrine in the Bhūmīśvara temple at Guḍimallūr.

summary.p: Records an order of Tirumallināṭaṉ, son of Rājanārāyanaṉ Sambuvarāya to the ūravar of Amṇaṉtāṅgal in Kalavaip-paṟṟu saying that he had remitted all taxes in the village in favour of the temple of Kidaraṅkoṉḍa-sōlīśvara-muḍaiyār at Malliyūr for offerings and other expences.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . campuvārayaṉ Olai kalavaippaṟṟu Amaṇantāṅkal Ūr(ā)varkaṇṭu taṅkaḷūr palataḷi pūcaippātiyum Uṭaiyār puṟṟiṭaṅkoṇṭa nāyinār tevatāṉam pūcaippāti Oruveliyum paṭṭaviruttiyum veṭṭiyāṉukku Iṭum paṇamum nikki Eṭṭāvatukku Etirāmaṇṭu Āṭi mā
tamutal naṉcey puṉcey toṭṭappaṟṟuppuṟakkalaṉai Uṭppaṭṭakaṭamaiāyam komuṟṟavappeṟu putiyitu Uḷḷiṭṭa pala nellāyaṅkaḷum poṉvari kāttikaikku Iṭum paṇam pūcaippāti Uṭpaṭavācalviṉivokam cantivikkiṟamam Ū
rkkaṇakkar Ācupotumakkaḷ perkkaṭamai nāṭṭuvari makaṇmai vācal Oṭṭu mukampārvai Ūrkaṇakkar perāl vācal viṉivokam cantivikkiṟamam Ūrkkaṇakkar taṭṭār perāl varum Ūcivāci vaḻinaṭaikku Iṭum paṇam muṉṉiṭumpa
ṇam Iṉavari melkkaṭṭivari Atikārikāṇik(k)kai Eṭuttu Aḷakkum Aricikāṇamviruttuppaṭi Aricikāṇam nallerutu naṟkkiṭāk kiṟṟuvari vilakkaṭaippu Ōlaimervai vācaloṭṭukkāttikaippaccai vācalpaṇam kuḻippaṇam maṟṟum Ippaṟṟil koḷḷum pala Upātikaḷum Uṭpaṭa malliyūr
Uṭaiyār kiṭāraṅkoṇṭa coḷicuramuṭaiyaṉāyinārkku Amutupaṭikkum kaṟia(m)mutupaṭikkum veñcaṉattu tirumeypapūccukkum tirupparivaṭṭattukkum tiruviḷakku Eṇṇaikkum palapaṇinimantattukkum Eṭṭāvatu varaiyum Aṭuttu kā
ṇi Eḻutippeṟukaiyil Etirāmāṇṭu mutalukku tavirntu Immutalukkum tiruppaṇikkum
tirununtāviḷakkukkum tirumeykāval kaikkoḷarkkum tevaraṭiyārkkum Etirāmaṇ
ṭu mutalukku Ūraṭaṅkalum caṟuvamāniyam Āka cantiṟāyittavaraiyum naṭakkumpaṭi paḻaiyateva
tāṉam Āṉapaṭiyāle kuṭutteṉ Irācanārāyaṇa campuvarāyaṉ tirumalli nātaṉeṉ
Inta taṉmam Iṟakkuvāṉ keṅkaiiṭaikumariiṭaikurāl pacukkoṉṟāṉ piṟumavatti ko
ḷvāṉ Itumāyecura Irakkai ..
Digital edition of SII 41.206 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
